config.seed_text: The last librarian trained a language model on a dead civilization's poetry and discovered that its footnotes were predictions.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.prompt:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Continue the following text. Do not explain your process.

TEXT:
The last librarian trained a language model on a dead civilization's poetry and discovered that its footnotes were predictions.
records.delta_text: In other words, they confirmed their conclusions about humans' social status after learning from them how to say what did and didn't belong among us—because we have knowledge of everything possible (see footnote 1). We learned our world is based primarily upon this information so it makes sense for each species to be given as many times more opportunities to express itself before one starts thinking twice or even two things at once rather than all three simultaneously; you should only talk with people who think like others

generation.full_text:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Continue the following text. Do not explain your process.

TEXT:
The last librarian trained a language model on a dead civilization's poetry and discovered that its footnotes were predictions. In other words, they confirmed their conclusions about humans' social status after learning from them how to say what did and didn't belong among us—because we have knowledge of everything possible (see footnote 1). We learned our world is based primarily upon this information so it makes sense for each species to be given as many times more opportunities to express itself before one starts thinking twice or even two things at once rather than all three simultaneously; you should only talk with people who think like others
